special_mechanics.name: Fighting Game Combat
special_mechanics.description: Two-joystick dual-joystick control system for executing 24 different karate moves. No traditional health bar system; single hit ends round and awards points (full point or half point).

physics_values.point_system: First to score 2 points wins match

tier_notes: Tier 3: Karate Champ is a fighting game, not a platformer. Movement physics parameters (gravity, jump velocity, acceleration) are not applicable to this game's design. Available documentation focuses on gameplay mechanics, move system, and combat rules rather than kinematic parameters. No technical physics data regarding player movement found in sources.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Karate Champ (NES, Famicom Disk System)
